Main Menu - Story - Character Side Story (Menu to the left)

Wheel is guaranteed after 1 fail and it's 50/50
Character is 33% and guaranteed after 3 fails
Is this game f2p friendly? And is there a beginner guide? I downloaded It 2 days ago

Check pinned comment. 
Gives you a general idea of gameplay.
There's also been an influx of new english players, so you might as well just scroll up.

I dont think there's any English guide yet,  if only there'd be a kind soul that could make a general guide for new players in English. I'm looking at you Metamon. 


Anyway.
The game is very fun, and f2p friendly.
Infact, you're starting at the right time, the game is giving 1 free limited character from the past patches you can pick from.
Ok thank you for these tips buddy 👍

I am completely new to the game, so I fell I lack the information to make a good choice here.
Who among these should I pick? 

I have come to like the abyssal playstyle, but I do care about meta (although I know nothing of it yet).
I already have Caceus and Goliath (both Abyssal) but no other characters yet (but I am only at stage 1-4 of story, so I suspect being able to draw more if need be).
Lily also looked good. Does she need others for synchronicity? Or is 24 the given best pick here?
24 is best,lily need others for synchronicity and need up more
i didn't get this... i think
it gave me so much My Turn flashback
well yes im still obsessed with my old deck
Is she best out of them all?
Yeah that item.... Sometimes, I accidentally pick that up. It ruins my day.

On Android. I use 

Bubble Translate.

Out of all I've used. 
That seems to be the best translator.
I took a look at Tulu as well and he seems good. Considering a team with Caceus and Goliath, would 24 still be the top choice?
No, I only have Cadeus and Goliath.
if u want Goliath team Murphy is more suit
Any idea why is that like that?
Alright, thank you for the advice.
60 diamond to one draw and give 60 gold

I do not know what that means 😅 
What is diamond and gold?
Since a draw is usually 200, should I use that?
I think I have those translated as Silver Cores and Source Liquid, which is where my confusion came in. But I do not know what the gold is, as I have not received any.
Since a draw is usually 200, is it a better draw option?
if u want cost u money ,maybe buy month card is good choose
i dont see u have diamond , maybe u dont need care it now
I see it has the same option.

Oh, I misunderstood "diamond" as the diamond-shaped one on the right 🤕 
I think I understand now, thank you.
I'm using this team but it doesn't seem very good, should I replace anyone?
I don't mind doing that if my bandwidth weren't bad
I can teach you how to do it
yeah, that's the free male char. i didn't spend anything for his side story though
i got some weird pendant looking 5star wheel first

Wow! It looks like we have many new friends who speak English! Thank you all for playing Morimens! I am the game producer, Light. I'm sorry that the game doesn't have an English language option at the moment! A big thank you to <@611608223983599616>  for helping out and answering questions enthusiastically! I'd like to ask everyone, how did you come to know about Morimens?
Beato showed me Theis on the Reverse: 1999 server and I thought her design was really good so I wanted to try the game out.
The story and lore is also really nice. Lovecraftian/Cthulhu Mythos themes are my favorite!

There was a thread on the front page of r/gachagaming which got a good amount of views and brought attention to the game. The poster did a good job selling the art style and gameplay and the game itself looked unique enough to try.
I see. Thank you very much. We never thought this would happen.
Please enjoy Morimens, it's our great honor.

The game has a really unique niche, so I’m glad that A: it exists and B: someone was able to show it off. It’s exactly the kind of mood/aesthetic I and a lot of people I know are into. Hoping for lots of future success!
I was informed of it due to the corpse of another game

Here is the reddit post if you want to see people's responses. I think the responses have been very positive. They all like the art style and the setting, as well as the unique gameplay the game has -although I explained it very poorly in my comments... with some misinfo that I didn't notice <:sadKot:1069742221441638420>-

I'm honestly glad I found this game by chance being mentioned in passing.. I think I might play it for a very long time. Thank you for all your hard work <a:bugcatbow:1023875985860481035> 

https://www.reddit.com/r/gachagaming/comments/1cty7pt/hk_%E5%BF%98%E5%8D%BB%E5%89%8D%E5%A4%9C_morimens_a_roguelite_hidden_gem_with/
